item.title: Dam Capital Advisors Ltd Gains 3.18%: Key Factors Behind the Weekly Recovery
item.description: Dam Capital Advisors Ltd’s stock recorded a modest weekly gain of 3.18% from Rs.125.80 to Rs.129.80 between 16 and 20 March 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp recovery following a new 52-week and all-time low on 16 March, supported by a strong rebound in price and volume midweek despite ongoing challenges in profitability and institutional participation. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: Concord Enviro Systems Ltd Gains 16.06%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Surge
item.description: Concord Enviro Systems Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, surging 16.06% from Rs.244.40 to Rs.283.65 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined marginally by 0.28% over the same period. This sharp rebound followed a fresh all-time low on 16 March, with the stock recovering robustly amid heightened trading volumes and notable market activity. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: Ventive Hospitality Ltd Declines 0.72% Despite Hold Upgrade: 5 Key Insights from the Week
item.description: Ventive Hospitality Ltd closed the week ending 20 March 2026 at Rs.640.90, down 0.72% from Rs.645.55 the previous Friday, marginally underperforming the BSE Sensex which fell 0.28% over the same period. The stock experienced a volatile week marked by a significant technical upgrade to a Hold rating on 17 March, a sharp midweek price rally, and subsequent declines amid mixed market conditions and sector-specific challenges. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: Unimech Aerospace Declines 3.60%: 6 Key Factors Behind the Steep Weekly Slide
item.description: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd’s stock closed the week at Rs.797.60, down 3.60% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.827.35, underperforming the Sensex which declined 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by a persistent downtrend with multiple fresh 52-week and all-time lows amid deteriorating financial results and bearish technical signals. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: Laxmi Dental Ltd Falls 2.58%: 5 Key Factors Behind the Week’s Decline
item.description: Laxmi Dental Ltd’s shares declined by 2.58% over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.173.95 from Rs.178.55 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s marginal fall of 0.28%, highlighting the stock’s continued struggles amid weak financial results and persistent bearish technical signals. The week saw the stock hit fresh 52-week and all-time lows, reflecting ongoing challenges in both market sentiment and company fundamentals. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd Gains 4.79%: 4 Key Technical Shifts Shape the Week
item.description: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd recorded a 4.79% gain over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.114.80 compared to Rs.109.55 the previous Friday. This performance notably outpaced the Sensex, which declined by 0.28% during the same period. The week was marked by significant technical developments, including the formation of a bearish Death Cross, volatile price momentum shifts, and a sharp lower circuit hit amid heavy selling pressure, reflecting a complex and cautious market sentiment. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: Dr Agarwals Health Care Ltd’s Mixed Week: -0.46% Price, -0.28% Sensex Tell the Story
item.description: Dr Agarwals Health Care Ltd experienced a volatile week from 16 to 20 March 2026, closing marginally lower by 0.46% at Rs.424.25, slightly underperforming the Sensex’s 0.28% decline. The week was marked by significant technical developments, including a bearish Death Cross formation and a rating upgrade followed by a downgrade by MarketsMOJO, reflecting mixed signals amid strong financials and valuation concerns. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Ajax Engineering Ltd Gains 2.19%: Key Factors Behind the Weekly Recovery
item.description: Ajax Engineering Ltd’s stock recorded a modest weekly gain of 2.19%, closing at Rs.471.30 on 20 Mar 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by significant volatility, including the stock hitting a fresh 52-week and all-time low of Rs.451 on 16 Mar, followed by a recovery rally in the initial days before profit-taking pressure emerged towards the end of the week. This review analyses the key events and price movements shaping the stock’s performance amid ongoing earnings challenges and market sentiment shifts. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Borana Weaves Ltd Falls 7.33%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Borana Weaves Ltd experienced a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, with its stock price declining by 7.33% to close at Rs.346.55, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell by a modest 0.28%. The week was marked by a sharp shift in technical momentum, a downgrade in investment rating, and mixed signals from financial and valuation metrics, all contributing to heightened volatility and investor caution. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Belrise Industries Gains 7.16%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Belrise Industries Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 7.16% from Rs.176.60 to Rs.189.25 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock’s trajectory was shaped by a series of technical upgrades, robust financial results, and mixed market signals that together created a nuanced but optimistic outlook for this small-cap auto components player. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd Drops 7.01%: 5 Key Factors Behind the Steep Decline
item.description: Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd’s stock closed the week at Rs.179.05, down 7.01% from Rs.192.55 the previous Friday, significantly underperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by fresh 52-week and all-time lows, intensified bearish momentum, and a technical downgrade to a Sell rating, reflecting mounting pressures on the company’s valuation and financial metrics amid a challenging market environment. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Oswal Pumps Ltd Gains 7.38%: Key Events Driving This Week’s Rally
item.description: Oswal Pumps Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 7.38% from Rs.292.70 to Rs.314.30 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp recovery from a 52-week low on 16 March to an intraday high of Rs.326.95 on 20 March, driven by notable intraday surges and technical shifts amid mixed market conditions. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Kalpataru Ltd Declines 1.74%: Valuation Shifts and Volatility Mark the Week
item.description: Kalpataru Ltd experienced a turbulent week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.296.00, down 1.74% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.301.25. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s modest 0.28% decline over the same period, reflecting mixed investor sentiment amid sector challenges and valuation shifts. The stock’s price action was marked by a sharp intraday surge on 17 March, followed by volatility and a retreat in the latter part of the week. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd Gains 1.49%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd recorded a modest gain of 1.49% over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.394.10 compared to Rs.388.30 the previous Friday. This performance notably outpaced the Sensex, which declined by 0.28% during the same period. The week was marked by significant rating changes, valuation reassessments, and mixed financial signals that influenced the stock’s price trajectory amid broader market volatility. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: GNG Electronics Ltd Declines 1.79%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Volatility
item.description: GNG Electronics Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 16 to 20 March 2026, closing down 1.79% at Rs.380.75 despite multiple days hitting regulatory circuit limits. The stock’s volatility contrasted with the broader Sensex, which declined a modest 0.28% over the same period. Intense selling pressure early in the week was followed by strong buying momentum, reflecting a complex interplay of investor sentiment and technical factors. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Indiqube Spaces Ltd’s 4.87% Weekly Decline: High Leverage and Technical Weakness Drive Pressure
item.description: Indiqube Spaces Ltd’s stock experienced a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, closing marginally higher by 0.40% on Friday at Rs.149.10 but overall declining 4.87% from the week’s open of Rs.156.70 (adjusted from daily data). The stock underperformed the Sensex, which fell 0.28% over the same period, reflecting persistent bearish momentum amid high leverage concerns and weak technical indicators. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd Gains 0.74%: Technical Shift and Financial Strength Drive Stability
item.description: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 0.74%, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock demonstrated resilience amid a sideways technical trend and was buoyed by an upgrade to a Hold rating following robust quarterly financial performance and improved technical momentum. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Shanti Gold International Ltd Declines 1.73%: Valuation Shift Amid Volatile Week
item.description: Shanti Gold International Ltd experienced a turbulent week ending 20 March 2026, with its stock price declining 1.73% to close at Rs.184.80, underperforming the Sensex which fell 0.28%. The week was marked by a sharp drop to a 52-week low on 16 March, followed by a notable valuation upgrade amid ongoing market volatility. Despite intermittent rebounds, the stock remained under pressure, reflecting mixed investor sentiment in the micro-cap gems and jewellery sector. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Highway Infrastructure Ltd Falls 3.56%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Highway Infrastructure Ltd’s stock declined by 3.56% over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.48.27 compared to Rs.50.05 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s marginal 0.28% decline, reflecting company-specific challenges amid a broadly weak market. The stock hit fresh 52-week lows twice during the week, signalling sustained downward pressure despite some pockets of profit growth and valuation moderation. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: All Time Plastics Ltd Gains 6.44%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Move
item.description: All Time Plastics Ltd delivered a notable weekly gain of 6.44%, closing at Rs.210.85 on 20 Mar 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock’s trajectory was marked by a fresh 52-week and all-time low early in the week, followed by a sharp rebound amid valuation shifts and a downgrade to a Sell rating by MarketsMOJO. This review analyses the key events shaping the stock’s volatile week and their implications. Time: 51 minutes ago
